calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR#1694.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2005 Continued To Jan-19-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona Cesar Arroyo for failure to file Proof(s) of Service, obtain answer(s) or enter default(s) against defendant(s) is heard this day. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/19/2006 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Sara Lerschen. (212)
